issue.body:
## Discrepancy

- observation_id: `sha256:a17864a978dee265688e1c0edc92cd67463971c4d6f73fdf7c27f92861d50b17`
- page: 27
- kind: bbox_iou_below_threshold
- classification: bbox_iou_below_threshold
- target: gs001:row:1
- proposed owner layer: pdf_oxide_core_bug

## Evidence
bbox_iou_below_threshold

## Recommended engine fix
classifier: running_header must classify as header_footer_noise

## Closure requirement
Deterministic proof only: pdf-lab regression-check PASS with this
defect class strictly decreased and no blocking class increased.

## Tau Recovery Binding
- Source projection: `/home/graham/workspace/experiments/pdf_oxide-gs001/artifacts/pdf-lab/loop-runs/gs001-ticket-lifecycle-run2/intermediate/gs001-ticket-projection.json`
- Criterion: `6`
- Parent goal hash: `sha256:9d2bd5e1992e0e9875d1e14d78cc7ffb8cce4c087ab58a41447f999ae7118580`

comments.body:
Closure evidence for the specific issue #4 defect only.

Deterministic artifact: artifacts/pdf_lab/issue4_running_header_noise_20260720/issue4_before_after_regression.json
Evidence bundle: artifacts/pdf_lab/issue4_running_header_noise_20260720/issue4_running_header_noise_evidence.zip

Gate result from issue4_before_after_regression.json:
- status: PASS
- issue_signature_decreased: true
- blocking_class_increased: false
- header_footer_noise_increased: true
- table_preserved: true

Commands recorded in proof_summary.json:
- PYTHONPATH=python uv run --with reportlab --with pymupdf pytest -q tests/test_nist_running_header_merge.py -> 2 passed in 0.31s
- uv run --with ruff ruff check tests/test_nist_running_header_merge.py -> All checks passed!

Remote main evidence commit: b1cc6134d7a0f12fb53e06b3e6a14f168460bc51

Scope: closes only the page 27 running_header -> header_footer_noise classifier defect described in this issue. It does not claim full GS001 convergence or live model second-pass health.
